---
title: "install_skill.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/skills/install_skill.py"
loc: 123
complexity: 22
logic_score: 0.50
style_score: 3.79
intel_score: 7.25
overall_score: 3.52
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating SkillInstaller, _sanitize_name.

## Interaction Protocol
Import SkillInstaller and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 45 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [re](file://re)
- [shutil](file://shutil)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.core.promotion_registry](file://src.core.promotion_registry)

### Exports
- `SkillInstaller`
- `_sanitize_name`
- `_validate_path`
- `_get_config`
- `_verify_integrity`
- `_run_security_scan`
- `_promote_skill`
- `_execute_installation_logic`
- `install`
